# Spec-Driven Development Template

> Bilingual (EN/ES) template to learn Spec-Driven Development and apply it to real projects with AI agents. GitHub Spec Kit is the base workflow; this repo adds starter structure, a machine-checked gate (no code before approved spec and consistent plan), agent rules, a local MCP server, and a compact spec/ sidecar for existing codebases.

Key rules for agents: read AGENTS.md and template-context/core-instructions/AGENT_OPERATING_SYSTEM.md first. Validation: ./scripts/validate-sdd.sh . --strict, ./scripts/check-sdd-policy.sh ., ./scripts/check-sdd-gate.sh .

## Start here

- [README](https://github.com/juanklagos/spec-driven-development-template/blob/main/README.md): overview, entry doors, golden rule
- [AGENTS.md](https://github.com/juanklagos/spec-driven-development-template/blob/main/AGENTS.md): rules for AI agents
- [AI_START_HERE](https://github.com/juanklagos/spec-driven-development-template/blob/main/AI_START_HERE.md): operating rules and prompts by level
- [QUICKSTART](https://github.com/juanklagos/spec-driven-development-template/blob/main/QUICKSTART.md): technical quickstart
- [sdd.policy.yaml](https://github.com/juanklagos/spec-driven-development-template/blob/main/sdd.policy.yaml): machine-readable policy

- [SDD skill](https://github.com/juanklagos/spec-driven-development-template/blob/main/skills/sdd-workflow/SKILL.md): portable Agent Skill of this workflow
